<!-- What is the underlying need? Who feels the pain or sees the opportunity? -->

- [ ] Backend API (`backend/`)

- [ ] Documentation

- [ ]

## Out of scope

<!-- What this feature explicitly does NOT include. -->

## Open questions

**Reminder:** this is a research project in Phase 0. Features that increase complexity should be weighed against the validation timeline.
